metadata.title: Workflow Planning - Sources
metadata.description: High-signal sources for planning levels, Definition of Ready/Done, slicing, acceptance criteria, and delivery/flow metrics

planning_and_flow.name: DORA (DevOps Research and Assessment)
planning_and_flow.description: Delivery and reliability metrics and research summaries (lead time, deployment frequency, MTTR, change failure rate)

planning_and_flow.name: DORA 5 Metrics (2025 Update)
planning_and_flow.description: Addition of Reliability as fifth DORA metric

planning_and_flow.name: DORA Metrics 2025 Best Practices
planning_and_flow.description: 2025 benchmarks, AI impact on metrics, calculation best practices

planning_and_flow.name: Scrum Guide (Definition of Done, Sprint Planning)
planning_and_flow.description: Official Scrum Guide reference for DoD and sprint planning

planning_and_flow.name: Agile Alliance - Definition of Ready
planning_and_flow.description: Definition of Ready concept and common usage

planning_and_flow.name: Shape Up
planning_and_flow.description: Appetite-based scoping and shaping work before execution

planning_and_flow.name: Atlassian WIP Limits Guide
planning_and_flow.description: WIP limits best practices for Kanban flow optimization

planning_and_flow.name: Scrumban Framework Guide
planning_and_flow.description: Hybrid Scrum-Kanban methodology with planning triggers

acceptance_criteria_and_specs.name: Gherkin Syntax Reference
acceptance_criteria_and_specs.description: Given/When/Then syntax reference for acceptance criteria

org_and_coordination.name: Team Topologies
org_and_coordination.description: Team interaction modes and organizational patterns for faster delivery with lower cognitive load

optional_ai.name: Planning automation with Claude Code (Optional)
optional_ai.description: Optional AI-assisted workflows for planning (requires human validation)

optional_ai.name: Addy Osmani - LLM Coding Workflow 2026
optional_ai.description: Planning-first approach for AI-assisted development, scope management patterns
